---
description: Generate or refresh ai-artifacts/conventions.md by analyzing the codebase — injected automatically into all implementation workflows
---

Call `workflow_conventions` immediately with no arguments.

When done, tell the user:
- The file was written to `ai-artifacts/conventions.md`
- They can open and edit it freely
- It will be automatically injected into `workflow_story_task`, `workflow_story_dev`, and `workflow_task`
- They can re-run `/workflow-conventions` at any time to refresh it from the codebase
